title: User Manual: Forest Clearance Mobile App
introduction: The Forest Clearance Mobile App is designed to help you access and manage forest clearance proposals on-the-go. With this app, you can easily track the status of proposals, monitor timelines, and take timely actions. This app is an extension of the existing PARIVESH web portal, making it easier for you to stay updated and make informed decisions.
purpose: You'll use this app to stay informed about new proposals, track pending actions, and receive alerts about upcoming deadlines, all in one convenient place.
